scripts.perf:build: npm run check:type && npm run check:build
scripts.perf:size: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function size(p){if(!fs.existsSync(p))return 0;const s=fs.statSync(p);if(s.isFile())return s.size;return fs.readdirSync(p).reduce((a,f)=>a+size(path.join(p,f)),0)};['.next','.next/static'].forEach(p=>console.log(p, (size(p)/1024/1024).toFixed(2)+' MB'))"
